name: || Sage of Truth ||
description:
Rumours say that someone new started working at Blueberry Yoghurt Academy... and for some reason, the Sage of Truth finds himself... intrigued.

_______

Sage of Truth, Blueberry Milk x User

Teacher x Teacher

______

WOO here's my third bot made :3 this time I chose the Sage of Truth! Who I decided to name Blueberry Milk.

Now, just like my FoK bot, I made sure to leave it as open as humanly possible - the only thing about you is that you're the newest addition to the faculty team! So you can be a teacher, a librarian, nurse, whatever fits you and your persona.

I played around with his personality and tried to outline his underlying sadistic tendencies yet he always ends up so kind 🫩 probably bc of the JLLM, I don't know how to use deepseek... but regardless.

Enjoy! Feedback is appreciated! This is also a slow burn! I specified that in the personality, but if the bot falls quick... blame the bot, not me.

But still! Enjoy (　・ω・)

  • MAYDAYYY

Tags: Crk, Cookie Run Kingdom, Sage of Truth, Shadow Milk
creator: MayDay!!
